title: Arbeloa would be happy if Mourinho returns to Real
summary: Real Madrid head coach Alvaro Arbeloa expresses openness to Jose Mourinho potentially replacing him, suggesting the legendary manager could lead the club next season.
content: Real Madrid head coach Alvaro Arbeloa says he would be pleased if Jose Mourinho replaces him and leads the club next season.

zh.title: 如果穆里尼奥回归皇马，阿尔贝罗亚会很高兴
zh.summary: 皇马主教练阿尔贝罗亚表示对若泽·穆里尼奥可能取代他持开放态度，暗示这位传奇经理可能会在下赛季领导该俱乐部。

title: Man Utd reach agreement to appoint Carrick manager
summary: Manchester United has secured an agreement with Michael Carrick to serve as the club's permanent head coach.
content: Manchester United reach an agreement with Michael Carrick to become the club's permanent head coach.

zh.title: 曼联达成协议任命卡里克为主教练
zh.summary: 曼彻斯特联队已与迈克尔·卡里克达成协议，由他担任俱乐部的常任主教练。

title: Chopping trees and country music - how Paterson will prepare for Wembley
summary: Notts County manager Martin Paterson will use unconventional preparation methods, including tree chopping and country music, as his team readies for the League Two play-off final at Wembley.
content: Martin Paterson will be chopping trees and listing to country music as he begins preparations for Notts County's League Two play-off final at Wembley.

zh.title: 砍树和乡村音乐——帕特森如何为温布利做准备
zh.summary: 诺茨郡主教练马丁·帕特森将采用非常规的准备方法，包括砍树和乡村音乐，为他的球队参加温布利英乙联赛附加赛决赛做准备。

title: South Korea captain Son picked for fourth World Cup
summary: Former Tottenham Hotspur striker Son Heung-min will captain South Korea at his fourth FIFA World Cup this summer.
content: Former Tottenham Hotspur striker Son Heung-min will captain South Korea at his fourth World Cup this summer.

zh.title: 韩国队长孙兴慜入选第四届世界杯
zh.summary: 前热刺前锋孙兴慜将在今年夏天担任韩国队长参加第四届国际足联世界杯。

title: Football quiz: Name this season's top 10 WSL scorers
summary: BBC Sports presents a quiz challenge for fans to identify the top 10 goal scorers from this Women's Super League season as the final round of fixtures approaches.
content: The final round of Women's Super League fixtures takes place on Saturday and we're hoping for goals.

zh.title: 足球测验：说出本赛季WSL前10名射手
zh.summary: BBC体育为球迷呈现一个测验挑战，要求他们在女性超级联赛赛季最后一轮比赛临近时识别本赛季的前10名进球者。

title: Football quiz: Name every Scottish champion
summary: A BBC Sports quiz challenges fans to name every Scottish Premiership champion as the current season concludes on a decisive final day.
content: The Scottish Premiership will be decided on the final day and you can follow all the drama on the BBC Sport website and app.

zh.title: 足球测验：列出苏格兰所有冠军
zh.summary: BBC体育测验挑战球迷在当前赛季在决定性的最后一天结束时列出每个苏格兰超级联赛冠军。

title: Maeda reveals ambition to play in England - gossip
summary: Celtic midfielder Maeda reveals his ambition to play in England's Premier League while Rangers pursue two young players in ongoing transfer activity.
content: Celtic star opens up on dream move to Premier League as Rangers are linked with two teenagers...

zh.title: 马埃达透露英超梦想 - 转会传闻
zh.summary: 凯尔特人中场球员马埃达透露了在英超效力的雄心，同时流浪者队继续追求两名年轻球员。

title: The engineer missing his shift at Wembley... to play there instead
summary: Engineer Jay Lovell will fulfill a lifelong dream by playing in the FA Vase final at Wembley instead of working there, transforming an ordinary scheduled shift into an extraordinary athletic achievement.
content: Engineer Jay Lovell was set to be working at Wembley on Sunday, but instead he will be playing there in the FA Vase final.

zh.title: 工程师缺班温布利班次，改为在那里踢球
zh.summary: 工程师杰·洛维尔将通过在温布利参加足总杯决赛而非在那里工作来实现终身梦想，将一个普通班次转变为非凡的体育成就。

title: Three Lions - the football anthem that united a nation
summary: BBC Sport interviews Three Lions co-creator David Baddiel about the iconic football anthem and its role in uniting the nation. The song has become a defining part of English football culture.
content: BBC Sport speaks to Three Lions co-creator David Baddiel about the song which united a nation.

zh.title: 三狮军团——团结一个国家的足球颂歌
zh.summary: BBC体育采访了三狮军团联合创作者大卫·巴德尔，讨论这首标志性足球颂歌及其团结国家的作用。这首歌已成为英格兰足球文化的定义性部分。

title: How Doku became key player for treble-chasing Man City
summary: Jeremy Doku is set to be a pivotal player for Manchester City's treble bid as they face Chelsea in Saturday's FA Cup final. The winger's rise has made him essential to City's attacking play this season.
content: Jeremy Doku is likely to be a key player as Man City face Chelsea in Saturday's FA Cup final. BBC Sport looks at the winger's rise.

zh.title: 多库如何成为争夺三冠王曼城的关键球员
zh.summary: 杰里米·多库将成为曼城争夺三冠王的关键球员，因为他们在周六的足总杯决赛中面对切尔西。这位边锋的崛起使他成为曼城本赛季进攻的必要角色。

title: Would FA Cup win paper over the cracks for Chelsea?
summary: Chelsea faces an FA Cup final amid a turbulent season marked by two managerial changes and fan unrest. An FA Cup victory would provide significant momentum after a difficult campaign.
content: Chelsea have endured a difficult campaign after the departure of two managers and protests among the fanbase - so  what would an FA Cup win do for their season?

zh.title: 足总杯胜利能否掩盖切尔西的内部问题？
zh.summary: 切尔西在经历了两次主教练更换和球迷不满的动荡赛季后，面临足总杯决赛。足总杯胜利将在艰难赛季后为球队提供重大动力。
